name: Bug report
about: Create a report to help us improve
title: ''
labels: ''
assignees: ''

---

**Title:** [Short description; x item is in russian]

**The Bug (mandatory)**
**Type:** [Client Crash / Server Crash / Sprite Glitch / Mechanics / Mapping Error]
**Description:**
[Detailed description of what broke. Example: "I was dragging a locker through the airlock, and the door crushed me, but instead of taking damage, my character sprite disappeared."]

**Steps to Reproduce (if possible)**
1. Be a [Role, if relevant].
2. Go to [Location].
3. Pick up [Item].
4. [Action].
5. Observe [Result].

**Expected Behavior (if known)**
[What *should* happen in SS14 logic? e.g., "The airlock should cycle or crush me with damage, not delete my sprite."]

**Environment (if relevant)**
* **OS:** [Windows 10/11, Linux Distro, MacOS]
* **Launcher:** [Steam / Standalone Launcher]
* **Build/Commit:** [If known - usually visible in the F3 menu]

**6. Logs & Evidence (if relevant)**
* **Client Logs:** [Attach your `client.log` file. You can find this in `%appdata%\Space Station 14\logs` on Windows or `~/.local/share/Space Station 14/logs` on Linux.]
* **Screenshots/Video:** [Upload here]
* **Player.log:** [If the game crashed entirely]

**Additional Context (if relevant)**
* Was there high lag/packet loss at the time?
